question: What color characterizes the dense field of grass or reeds in the foreground across most of the video? A. White B. Grey C. Reddish-brown D. Orange
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A field of reddish-brown grass contains scattered white patches of snow or frost. A dense line of dark, leafless trees forms a silhouette against a bright overcast sky with pinkish hues. A large flock of white birds gathers closely together in front of the treeline. A low, rectangular concrete structure sits in the middle distance among the vegetation.

Describe the visual progression of the landscape and key events visible throughout the video, noting specific timestamps for distinct changes.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a bright red streak moves diagonally across the upper right scene; at 10s, a low rectangular concrete structure sits in the middle distance among red vegetation; at 12s, a large flock of white birds gathers closely together in the field; at 18s, bare trees sway rapidly against a warm sky with orange hues.
